com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client

Class RemoteExecutionClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.client.RemoteExecutionClient
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ICampaignExecution, IExecutionBase, IExecutionServer, IExecutionServerConstants

    public class RemoteExecutionClient
extends java.lang.Object
implements IExecutionServer, IExecutionServerConstants, ICampaignExecution
    Base implementation of a TTman Client. Handles internally log retrieval, session and job management.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionServer

        DEFAULT_CLIENT_PORT_NUMBER, DEFAULT_SERVER_ADMIN_PASSWORD, DEFAULT_SERVER_ADMIN_PORT_NUMBER, DEFAULT_SERVER_PORT_NUMBER

      • Fields inherited from interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.IExecutionServerConstants

        SERVER_MAJOR_VERSION, SERVER_MINOR_VERSION

      • Fields inherited from interface com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.IExecutionBase

        AVOID_NAME_CLASH, OVERRIDE, SYNC

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      RemoteExecutionClient()
      Create a new execution client (starts local service handler on port IExecutionServer.DEFAULT_CLIENT_PORT_NUMBER when connect(String, int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler) is called)
      RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode mode)
      Create a remote execution client
      RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode mode, ILogModelFactory logModelFactory)
      Create a new execution client (starts local service handler at given address and port when connect(String, int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler) is called)
      RemoteExecutionClient(java.net.InetAddress address, int portNumber, ExecutionServerMode mode)
      Deprecated. 
      Use RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode)
      RemoteExecutionClient(java.net.InetAddress address, int portNumber, ExecutionServerMode mode, ILogModelFactory logModelFactory)
      Deprecated. 
      use RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode, ILogModelFactory)

      void clearLog()
      Clear the execution log.

      Setup a connection to a running TTman Execution Server.

      Sets up the clientContext and gets server attributes

      Deletes a project from the server workspace.
      void disconnect()
      Disconnects from the TTman Execution Server, closes the session.

      configure the enabling of logging and log-events to be disabled.

      Enqueues a campaign execution.

      Submit a execution of a control part.

      Submit a execution of a test case.

      Create an IOException failure

      The execution engine attributes
      ILogModelView getMainLogModel()
      Retrieve the log model of the main log (containing all events outside of testcases) for the currently running test suite.

      The Project Manager

      Get the attributes of the TTman server located at the given address
      java.util.Map<Job,TestCaseStatus> getTestCaseStatus(Job... jobs)
      Returns the status of a given list of execution jobs.
      boolean isConnected()
      The connection state
      static boolean isReachable(java.lang.String host, int port)
      Check if two way communication with the TTman server at host:port is possible

      Kill the test system.

      Provide the list of available test cases from all the modules loaded

      Provide the list of available test modules with control part

      Provide the list the enqueued and running jobs

      Load a CLF or MCF from file

      Load a CLF or MCF from the given project.

      Reload the modules of the test system.

      Save the execution log to a file (TLZ format).

      Create an IOException for server failure

      Set environment variables for the test execution process.

      Set Java VM Arguments for the execution process.
      void setJVMArguments(java.lang.String... vmArguments)
      Set Java VM Arguments for the execution process.
      void setModuleParameters(java.util.Set<Parameter> parameters)
      Set or overwrite the module parameters encoded with the encoding rules defined by Parameter.getEncoding() In case the encoded value is not decodable with the given encoding rule, the default value will be used instead.

      Initialize the test adapter according to given configuration.

      Terminate the current test execution session.

      Create a local server on the local host and setup a connection to this TTman Execution Server.

      Trigger termination of all test execution jobs

      Trigger termination of test execution jobs

    • Constructor Detail

      • RemoteExecutionClient

        public RemoteExecutionClient()
        Create a new execution client (starts local service handler on port IExecutionServer.DEFAULT_CLIENT_PORT_NUMBER when connect(String, int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler) is called)

      • RemoteExecutionClient

        public RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode mode)
        Create a remote execution client
        Parameters:
        mode - execution mode

      • RemoteExecutionClient

        public RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode mode,
                             ILogModelFactory logModelFactory)
        Create a new execution client (starts local service handler at given address and port when connect(String, int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler) is called)
        Parameters:
        mode - execution mode
        logModelFactory - log model factory to use

      • RemoteExecutionClient

        @Deprecated
public RemoteExecutionClient(java.net.InetAddress address,
                                         int portNumber,
                                         ExecutionServerMode mode,
                                         ILogModelFactory logModelFactory)
        Deprecated. use RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode, ILogModelFactory)
        Create a new execution client (starts local service handler at given address and port when connect(String, int, Credentials, IExecutionHandler) is called)
        Parameters:
        address - no longer used
        portNumber - no longer used
        mode - execution mode
        logModelFactory - log model factory to use

      • RemoteExecutionClient

        @Deprecated
public RemoteExecutionClient(java.net.InetAddress address,
                                         int portNumber,
                                         ExecutionServerMode mode)
        Deprecated. Use RemoteExecutionClient(ExecutionServerMode)
        Create a remote execution client
        Parameters:
        address - no longer used
        portNumber - no longer used
        mode - execution mode

    • Method Detail

      • connect0

        protected void connect0(java.lang.String host,
                        int port,
                        IExecutionHandler handler)
                 throws java.io.IOException
        Sets up the clientContext and gets server attributes
        Parameters:
        host - server host
        port - server port
        handler - execution handler
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if connection fails

      • connect

        public void connect(java.lang.String host,
                    int port,
                    Credentials credentials,
                    IExecutionHandler handler)
             throws java.io.IOException,
                    AuthenticationException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Setup a connection to a running TTman Execution Server. These version values from IExecutionServerConstants are compared for each client connect, an exception is thrown on mismatch.
        Specified by:
        connect in interface IExecutionBase
        Parameters:
        host - server host or IP address
        port - server port number
        handler - callback handler for asynchronous feedback from TTman Execution Server
        Throws:
        AuthenticationException - thrown if the user could not be authenticated (wrong credentials)
        java.io.IOException - thrown if the server could not be reached, protocol version mismatch or other communication errors

      • startServer

        public void startServer(int port,
                        Credentials adminCredentials,
                        IExecutionHandler handler)
                 throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer
        Create a local server on the local host and setup a connection to this TTman Execution Server. This method is not supported on the client side.
        Specified by:
        startServer in interface IExecutionServer
        Parameters:
        port - server port number
        handler - callback handler for asynchronous feedback from TTman Execution Server
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if the server could not be started or reached

      • disconnect

        public void disconnect()
                throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Disconnects from the TTman Execution Server, closes the session.
        Specified by:
        disconnect in interface IExecutionBase
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if not connected or network error occurred

      • setEnvironmentVariables

        public void setEnvironmentVariables(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> environment,
                                    boolean replace)
                             throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Set environment variables for the test execution process. The method has to be called before a campaign (CLF) is loaded otherwise the effect is observed only after the next #loadTestSuiteFromFile(File) or #loadTestSuiteFromString(String) method call.
        Specified by:
        setEnvironmentVariables in interface IExecutionBase
        Parameters:
        environment - a map of variables key=value
        replace - when true the existing environment variables will be replaced by the new ones
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if not connected or network error occurred

      • setJVMArguments

        public void setJVMArguments(java.lang.String... vmArguments)
                     throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Set Java VM Arguments for the execution process. The method has to be called before a campaign (CLF) is loaded otherwise the effect is observed only after the next #loadTestSuiteFromFile(File) or #loadTestSuiteFromString(String) method call.
        Specified by:
        setJVMArguments in interface IExecutionBase
        Parameters:
        vmArguments - list of parameters that will be used for the execution process
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if not connected or network error occurred

      • setJVMArguments

        public void setJVMArguments(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> vmArguments)
                     throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Set Java VM Arguments for the execution process. The method has to be called before a campaign (CLF) is loaded otherwise the effect is observed only after the next #loadTestSuiteFromFile(File) or #loadTestSuiteFromString(String) method call. Both keys and values are added verbatim to the execution process command line.
        Specified by:
        setJVMArguments in interface IExecutionBase
        Parameters:
        vmArguments - a map of Java VM arguments.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if not connected or network error occurred

      • setModuleParameters

        public void setModuleParameters(java.util.Set<Parameter> parameters)
                         throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Set or overwrite the module parameters encoded with the encoding rules defined by Parameter.getEncoding() In case the encoded value is not decodable with the given encoding rule, the default value will be used instead.
        Specified by:
        setModuleParameters in interface IExecutionBase
        Parameters:
        parameters - module parameters encoded as defined by Parameter.getEncoding()
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if test suite not loaded, not connected or network error occurred

      • loadTestSuiteFromFile

        public void loadTestSuiteFromFile(java.io.File file)
                           throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer
        Load a CLF or MCF from file
        Specified by:
        loadTestSuiteFromFile in interface IExecutionServer
        Parameters:
        file - the *.clf or *.mcf file as an absolute path (or the workspace relative path) of an existing CLF or MCF file inside the TTmanServer's workspace
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if file not found, parse error, not connected or network error occurred

      • loadTestSuiteFromFile

        public java.io.InputStream loadTestSuiteFromFile(java.lang.String project,
                                                 java.lang.String clfPath)
                                          throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer
        Load a CLF or MCF from the given project. The campaign file must exist in the server workspace.
        Specified by:
        loadTestSuiteFromFile in interface IExecutionServer
        Parameters:
        project - the name of the project in the server workspace. null or empty string produces an IllegalArgumentException
        clfPath - the project relative path to the *.clf or *.mcf file the project relative path of an existing CLF or MCF file inside the TTmanServer's workspace.
        Returns:
        input stream which pipes the TE's standard output stream
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if file not found, parse error, not connected or network error occurred

      • loadTestSuiteFromString

        public java.io.InputStream loadTestSuiteFromString(java.lang.String project,
                                                   java.lang.String content)
                                            throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer
        Load a CLF or MCF by content. The campaign will be loaded in the given project context. This method should be called when the CLF is generated.
        Specified by:
        loadTestSuiteFromString in interface IExecutionServer
        Parameters:
        project - the name of the project in the server workspace
        content - the content of the campaign file
        Returns:
        input stream which pipes the TE's standard output stream
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown on parse error, not connected or network error occurred

      • listAvailableTestCases

        public java.util.Set<TestCase> listAvailableTestCases()
                                               throws java.io.IOException,
                                                      AuthenticationException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer
        Provide the list of available test cases from all the modules loaded
        Specified by:
        listAvailableTestCases in interface IExecutionServer
        Returns:
        the list of available test cases from all the modules loaded
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if test suite not loaded, not connected or network error occurred
        AuthenticationException

      • listAvailableTestControlModules

        public java.util.Set<java.lang.String> listAvailableTestControlModules()
                                                                throws java.io.IOException,
                                                                       AuthenticationException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer
        Provide the list of available test modules with control part
        Specified by:
        listAvailableTestControlModules in interface IExecutionServer
        Returns:
        the list of available test modules with control part
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if test suite not loaded, not connected or network error occurred
        AuthenticationException

      • executeControl

        public ExecuteControlJob executeControl(java.lang.String module)
                                 throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer
        Submit a execution of a control part. All test cases within are also executed in separate jobs having as a parent the control execution job. The execution can be later identified by the returned job. See Job for details.
        Specified by:
        executeControl in interface IExecutionServer
        Parameters:
        module - module contains the control part
        Returns:
        the job which will start the execution
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if test suite not loaded, not connected or network error occurred

      • executeTestCase

        public ExecuteTestCaseJob executeTestCase(java.lang.String module,
                                          java.lang.String testCaseName,
                                          java.util.List<Parameter> parameters)
                                   throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer
        Submit a execution of a test case. The execution can be later identified by the returned job. See Job for details.
        Specified by:
        executeTestCase in interface IExecutionServer
        Parameters:
        module - module contains the test case
        testCaseName - test case name
        parameters - test case parameters
        Returns:
        the job which will start the execution
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if test suite not loaded, not connected or network error occurred

      • listExecutionJobs

        public java.util.List<Job> listExecutionJobs()
                                      throws java.io.IOException,
                                             AuthenticationException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Provide the list the enqueued and running jobs
        Specified by:
        listExecutionJobs in interface IExecutionBase
        Returns:
        the list the enqueued and running jobs
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if test suite not loaded, not connected or network error occurred
        AuthenticationException

      • stopExecution

        public void stopExecution(Job... jobs)
                   throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Trigger termination of test execution jobs
        Specified by:
        stopExecution in interface IExecutionBase
        Parameters:
        jobs - the jobs which started the execution
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if test suite not loaded, not connected or network error occurred

      • stopExecution

        public void stopExecution()
                   throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Trigger termination of all test execution jobs
        Specified by:
        stopExecution in interface IExecutionBase
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if test suite not loaded, not connected or network error occurred

      • getTestCaseStatus

        public java.util.Map<Job,TestCaseStatus> getTestCaseStatus(Job... jobs)
                                                    throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer

        Returns the status of a given list of execution jobs. If a control job is given as a parameter the testcases executed from the control part will be added to the result, however the status of the control job itself will not be available.

        Other job types than execute testcase and execute control are ignored!

        Specified by:
        getTestCaseStatus in interface IExecutionServer
        Parameters:
        jobs - the jobs which started the execution
        Returns:
        the status of all test cases started by these jobs
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if test suite not loaded, not connected or network error occurred

      • clearLog

        public void clearLog()
              throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer
        Clear the execution log. Calling this method while a job execution is in progress will throw and exception. WARNING: All test results are server side deleted!
        Specified by:
        clearLog in interface IExecutionServer
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if not connected or network error occurred or if a job is currently executed

      • saveLog

        public void saveLog(java.io.File file)
             throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer
        Save the execution log to a file (TLZ format). This methods blocks until the complete TLZ file was transferred to the client and stored into the given location. If the size of the log exceeds a certain limit, the log is transfered in one megabyte blocks handled internally by IExecutionLogFileHandler.
        Specified by:
        saveLog in interface IExecutionServer
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if test suite not loaded, not connected or network error occurred

      • shutdownServer

        public void shutdownServer(boolean force)
                    throws java.io.IOException,
                           AuthenticationException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Terminate the current test execution session. WARNING: All test results are deleted on the server side!
        Specified by:
        shutdownServer in interface IExecutionBase
        Parameters:
        force - true kills the TTman Execution Server. Ungraceful shutdown.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - thrown if not connected or network error occurred
        AuthenticationException

        protected java.io.IOException failure(java.lang.String message)
        Create an IOException failure
        Parameters:
        message -
        Returns:
        IOException

                                      java.lang.Throwable e)
        Create an IOException failure
        Parameters:

        e -
        Returns:

      • serverError

        protected java.io.IOException serverError(java.lang.String message,
                                          Status status)
        Create an IOException for server failure
        Parameters:
        message -
        status -
        Returns:
        the error

      • publishProject

        public java.lang.String publishProject(java.net.URI sourceURI,
                                       java.lang.String projectName,
                                       int flags,
                                       ExecutorRequirements executorRequirements)
                                throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase

        Publishes a project to the server workspace.

        Flags

        • OVERRIDE (1) - override the existing project in the workspace
        Specified by:
        publishProject in interface IExecutionBase
        Parameters:
        sourceURI - project uri to import/update into the workspace
        projectName - the desired name of the project in the workspace, can be null if a specific name is not required
        flags - load flags as defined by IExecutionBase.AVOID_NAME_CLASH, IExecutionBase.OVERRIDE and IExecutionBase.SYNC
        executorRequirements - project execution requirements, can be null for no requirements
        Returns:
        The name of the imported project. If the project name is already used in the workspace then it will be appended with _n where n is the first free number starting from 1.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if the project cannot be loaded, executor requirements are not met or network error occurred

      • deleteProject

        public void deleteProject(java.lang.String projectName)
                   throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase

        Deletes a project from the server workspace.

        Specified by:
        deleteProject in interface IExecutionBase
        Parameters:
        projectName - project to delete
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if the project cannot be deleted

      • enqueueCamapign

        public ExecuteCampaignJob enqueueCamapign(java.lang.String projectName,
                                          java.lang.String clfPath,
                                          ExecutorRequirements executorRequirements)
                                   throws java.io.IOException,
                                          AuthenticationException
        Description copied from interface: ICampaignExecution
        Enqueues a campaign execution.
        Specified by:
        enqueueCamapign in interface ICampaignExecution
        Parameters:
        projectName - project name in the server workspace
        clfPath - project relative campaign file path
        executorRequirements - requirements for campaign execution
        Returns:
        an execution job that may be used to cancel and follow the execution request
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
        AuthenticationException

      • reloadTestSystem

        public void reloadTestSystem(boolean reloadModules)
                      throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Reload the modules of the test system.
        Specified by:
        reloadTestSystem in interface IExecutionBase
        Parameters:
        reloadModules - if update is true, only reinitialize the modules dependent on the changed parameters, otherwise, reload all modules.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • killTestSystem

        public void killTestSystem()
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        Kill the test system.
        Specified by:
        killTestSystem in interface IExecutionBase
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • enableLogging

        public void enableLogging(boolean enabled,
                          int[] logEvents2Disable)
                   throws java.io.IOException
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionBase
        configure the enabling of logging and log-events to be disabled.
        Specified by:
        enableLogging in interface IExecutionBase
        Parameters:
        enabled - true if log generation should be enabled, false otherwise
        logEvents2Disable - a table where each entry represents a log event and each entry which is set to true disables generation of that log event.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getMainLogModel

        public ILogModelView getMainLogModel()
        Description copied from interface: IExecutionServer
        Retrieve the log model of the main log (containing all events outside of testcases) for the currently running test suite.
        Specified by:
        getMainLogModel in interface IExecutionServer
        Returns:
        the log model of the main log for the currently running test suite.

      • isConnected

        public boolean isConnected()
        The connection state
        Returns:
        true if the connection is active, false otherwise

      • isReachable

        public static boolean isReachable(java.lang.String host,
                                  int port)
                           throws java.io.IOException
        Check if two way communication with the TTman server at host:port is possible
        Parameters:
        host - server host
        port - server port
        Returns:
        true if the server is reachable, otherwise an exception will be thrown if the server is not reachable
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if
        • server version is not compatible
        • communication errors occur

      • getServerAttributes

        public static IExecutionAttributes getServerAttributes(java.lang.String host,
                                                       int port)
                                                throws java.io.IOException
        Get the attributes of the TTman server located at the given address
        Parameters:
        host - ttManServer host
        port - ttManServer port
        Returns:
        ttManServer attributes
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if connection fails
